title: Expeditors (EXPD) Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Expeditors' (EXPD) Q1 revenues decline 44% year over year.

title: Compared to Estimates, Expeditors International (EXPD) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Expeditors International (EXPD) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Expeditors International (EXPD) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.45 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.36 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.05 per share a year ago.

title: Expeditors tops profit expectations but revenue falls well short amid continued soft logistics demand
text: Expeditors International of Washington Inc. EXPD reported Tuesday first-quarter profit that topped expectations but revenue that fell well short, as the logistics company's business continued to be hurt by soft demand and “significantly” lower buy and sell rates. The stock was still inactive in premarket trading.
